fixtures.compatibilityPurpose: Preserve unknown nested extension members and exact number tokens.
Preserve every JSON value kind, including nested null and the raw numeric token.
A V1 reader accepts and ignores an additive ordinary member it does not understand.
Unknown ordinary members are ignored while future input-role and response-format values and governed extensions remain distinguishable.
Preserve a valid future provider registry key without requiring registry recognition.
Preserve an opaque future provider-owned model identifier exactly.
Ignore an additive ordinary target member while preserving provider and model identifiers.
Preserve an unknown valid input role while ignoring an additive ordinary member.
Preserve an unknown valid response-format kind while ignoring its additive ordinary member.
Ignore an additive ordinary generation member and retain empty canonical generation intent.
Preserve an opaque valid Unicode operation identifier exactly across every operation-ID type.
Preserve an unknown output kind and governed extensions while ignoring an additive ordinary member.
Preserve future raw usage-breakdown names while ignoring an additive ordinary member.
Preserve unknown error category and code values while ignoring an additive ordinary member.
Preserve future completion and output-kind values while ignoring additive ordinary members.
Preserve an unknown nonterminal event type and governed extensions while ignoring an additive ordinary member.
Preserve and order an unknown nonterminal event while dropping its additive ordinary member.
Preserve future capability, support, limit, and extension values while dropping an additive ordinary declaration member.
Retain the first V1 provider-profile shape as an older compatibility baseline.
Preserve future raw capability data and governed extensions while dropping an additive ordinary profile member.
Accept and drop an additive future-only member, producing the empty known V1 limit view.
Preserve future capability and extension data while dropping additive ordinary descriptor, target, and model-limit members.

Normalize an empty known V1 limit view to an omitted descriptor limits field.
